meaning: n.苏格兰威士忌利口酒(一种烈性甜酒)
examples: Pour DRAMBUIE over shaved ice in a rocks glass.
Pour DRAMBUIE over ice in a tall glass and fill with club soda.
Drambuie — a strong sweet alcoholic drink from Scotland made with whisky and herbs.
Drambuie, the whisky liqueur company, has been hit hard by the economic crisis in Greece.
The executive chairman of the Drambuie Liqueur Company, Phil Parnell, has died after a short illness.
